'''Obs Kaj''' was the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Lunis]] and a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Lunis and Kaj went to [[Katanos VII]] to [[Mission to Katanos VII|investigate]] rumored illegal [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]], and discovered the rumor to be true. The local [[Mining/Legends|miners]] attempted to capture the Lunis and his padawan, using [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]]-[[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Gundark/Legends|gundarks]], in order to hand them over to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] for [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

The two Jedi defended themselves, and Lunis attempted to connect with Kaj through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. However, he could not form a mental link with her, as she had grown so disillusioned with the Jedi Order's seeming hypocrisy during the Clone Wars that she had effectively cut herself off from the Force and her master. Lunis was killed by the miners before Obs Kaj's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. She escaped from the miners in one of their short-range pods, and tried to hail any nearby [[Starship/Legends|ships]], soon finding one in range. Unfortunately, the ship belonged to Count Dooku, who had his ship fire upon the pod, destroying it and killing Kaj.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|19|Rather Darkness Visible}} {{1st}}
